label: M_A_Mast_cell
evidence: Reynolds 2021 Table S1 lists mast cells among adult skin immune populations. The label M_A_Mast_cell in Gopee 2024 annotation indicates a mature/activated (M_A) mast cell state. Skin mast cells are predominantly connective tissue mast cells (MCTC) expressing both tryptase (TPSAB1) and chymase (CMA1) and carboxypeptidase A3 (CPA3), located in the papillary and reticular dermis, predominantly perivascular.
